subcodes.first_line: O thou who expoundeth divine evidences, behold the hidden Hand and the Pen that traceth lines - the steed in gallop, yet unseen the rider [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق ببینات الهی دست پنهان و قلم بین خط گذار اسب در جولان و ناپیدا سوار
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
